message:
chore: add .bv/ directory to .gitignore

The beads viewer (bv) creates a .bv/ directory for local config and
caches. This should not be tracked in version control as it contains
machine-specific state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,4 @@
 /target
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
